arts.ttl: 'If you don't do the right stuff': Sancho shares how Maresca reacts when a Chelsea player does something wrong
Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta urged to follow Chelsea blueprint with "X-factor" signing
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole that the Gunners need to seek out an "X-factor" forward and follow Chelsea's transfer blueprint.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Four youngsters feature in Astana Conference League game
arts.sum: Chelsea name their much-changed starting lineup for Thursday's Conference League game with Astana in Kazakhstan.

arts.ttl: New stance: Chelsea perform U-turn over terms of likely transfer deal
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly changed their stance on young English midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka as they now only want to send him out on loan rather than sell him. Chukwuemeka’s Chelsea future has looked in real doubt for some time now after a lack of opportunities in the Blues’ first-team since Enzo Maresca took over as manager. arts.ttl: 'Made contact': Chelsea have opened talks with Premier League rivals to sign 'incredible' player - journalist
Chelsea rule out Benoît Badiashile departure, despite elite-level interest
arts.sum: Benoît Badiashile (23) has made 10 starts for Chelsea this season, however, only two of those have come in the Premier League. Six have come in the UEFA Europa Conference…

arts.ttl: £60m Todd Boehly drama could be about to get much worse as Chelsea to give big clue in next few days
Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'prepared to pay' Franco Mastantuono release clause
arts.sum: Chelsea are allegedly prepared to pay the release clause of Franco Mastantuono in an effort to fend off rivals for the River Plate youngster's signature.

arts.ttl: The Chelsea players who could debut against Astana
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has named a large group of academy players in his squad to face Astana in the UEFA Conference League this afternoon. The clash is Chelsea’s furthest-ever European away trip and Maresca has opted to leave the bulk of his big hitters at home. arts.ttl: Transfer increasingly likely: Arsenal, Liverpool & Chelsea willing to rescue underrated star
arts.sum: Aurelien Tchouameni reportedly looks increasingly likely to leave Real Madrid at the end of this season, with Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea among his transfer suitors. Tchouameni has been linked with Liverpool for around €60m in a recent report from Sky’s Sacha Tavolieri, and now there’s been a further update on the France international’s future.
